name: Paul Serban
headline: Senior AI & full-stack engineer building agentic platforms that scale.
bio: 6+ years turning complex architectural constraints into production systems. I build agentic AI control planes, high-throughput platforms, and the internal tooling that removes bottlenecks — eliminating 90%+ of QA cycle overhead and cutting operations from hours to minutes. The engineer you hire when you need systems that scale and architecture decisions that age well.
